title: Group Fitness Coach (amber)
description:
amber, the exciting new sister brand of Amore Fitness, is an upcoming boutique women’s-only group functional training studio in Singapore. The studio is built around high-quality coaching, strong community, and long-term member development. Join us as we take a step towards a new era of fitness in Singapore. 

The Group Fitness Coach is responsible for delivering safe, engaging, and high-quality group training classes. This role plays a critical part in shaping the daily member experience and maintaining coaching standards.

You will coach group classes, support member development, and represent the studio’s values through professionalism, energy, and consistency. This position suits a coach who is confident on the floor, people-focused, and committed to continuous improvement.

Key Responsibilities: 

Coaching & Class Delivery

  • Coach group classes in line with studio programming and class templates
  • Deliver clear coaching cues while maintaining strong awareness across the training floor
  • Ensure classes are safe, well-organised, and aligned with programmed intent
  • Provide appropriate regressions, progressions, and technique corrections

Member Engagement & Experience

  • Create a supportive, inclusive, and motivating training environment
  • Build rapport with members and encourage consistency and confidence
  • Support new members during their onboarding and early classes
  • Contribute positively to the studio’s community culture

Professional Standards & Studio Support

  • Arrive prepared, punctual, and professional for all coaching shifts
  • Follow studio SOPs, coaching standards, and operational guidelines
  • Assist with equipment setup, breakdown, and general studio upkeep
  • Represent the studio positively on and off the floor

Qualifications and Experience: 

  • Recognised fitness certification (e.g. ACE, NASM, FISAF, CrossFit, or equivalent)
  • Comfortable coaching group classes independently
  • Prior group coaching experience in functional training or strength and conditioning. Candidates with no prior experience but have a strong passion and interest in pursuing a coaching role are encouraged to apply. 
  • Prior experience coaching women across different age groups is an advantage.

Requirements and Skill Set: 

  • Strong understanding of basic strength training and movement mechanics
  • Clear communication and confident class presence
  • Ability to manage multiple movements or stations within a class
  • Open to feedback and ongoing development
  • Available to work early mornings, evenings, and weekends

What We Offer:

  • Competitive salary + benefits package 
  • Free gym memberships 
  • Career progression through studio expansions 
  • Access to professional development, education and certifications 
  • Opportunity to be part of a studio from its early growth phase

We offer a competitive salary and benefits package based on merit and professional advantages of a dynamic environment that supports your development and recognizes your achievements.

Interested candidates are welcome to submit a detailed resume. For more information, please visit us at: www.amorefitness.com.

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Women Through Every Stage of Life

Since 1985, Amore Fitness has been Singapore’s leading women-only fitness and wellness brand — dedicated to helping women embrace healthier, stronger, and more confident lives.

From students and young professionals to mothers and seniors, we create a supportive community where women can thrive through every chapter of life.

Amore Fitness – Full-service gyms & studios with a wide range of group classes, from dance-inspired workouts to strength training, designed exclusively for women.
am Pilates – Dedicated reformer Pilates studios that focus on posture, core strength, and mindful movement.
Amore Define – Boutique spas offering rejuvenating treatments that restore balance and wellness.

With over four decades of experience, we remain passionate about blending fitness, wellness, and lifestyle into one holistic journey. Our mission goes beyond workouts — we aim to build a strong community of women who uplift and inspire one another.

👉 Join us as we redefine women’s wellness in Singapore.
Reach out to us at hr@amorefitness.com if you are keen to find out about our current openings!
postedCompany.name: AMORE FITNESS PTE. LTD.
